## Checklist

- [ ] Tests or verification are included.
- [ ] Docs are updated when behavior, contracts, architecture, or operations changed.
- [ ] OpenAPI/contracts are regenerated when API schemas changed.
- [ ] Database migrations are included when schema changed.
- [ ] Secrets, credentials, recordings, and customer data are not committed.
- [ ] Tenant isolation, runtime safety, and telecom abuse paths were considered.
